home.title: Control your finances
home.description: EzFin is the complete platform to manage your expenses, income, subscriptions and financial goals in one place.

features.title: Everything you need in one place
features.subtitle: Powerful features to simplify your financial life

transactions.title: Smart Transactions
transactions.description: Record income and expenses with automatic categorization and view your spending in real time.

subscriptions.title: Subscription Management
subscriptions.description: Track all your subscriptions and recurring expenses with due date reminders.

goals.title: Financial Goals
goals.description: Set savings goals and track your progress towards your financial targets.

analytics.title: Visual Analytics
analytics.description: Detailed charts and reports to understand where your money is going.

fast.title: Fast and Intuitive
fast.description: Modern and responsive interface that works perfectly on all devices.

secure.title: Secure and Private
secure.description: Your financial data is protected with secure authentication and modern encryption.

cta.title: Ready to transform your finances?
cta.subtitle: Plans starting at €4.99/month. Take full control of your money today.

footer.copyright: © 2026 EzFin. Simplified financial management for everyone.

addTransactionDialog.title: Add Transaction
addTransactionDialog.description: Manually record an expense or extra income.

addSubscriptionDialog.title: New Subscription
addSubscriptionDialog.description: Add monthly recurring expenses (Netflix, Rent, Internet).

addGoalDialog.title: New Goal
addGoalDialog.goalNameLabel: What do you want to achieve?
addGoalDialog.targetTip: Tip: Set a realistic goal to stay motivated!
addGoalDialog.success: Goal created! Time to start saving. 💰
addGoalDialog.error: An unexpected error occurred while saving the goal.

historyPage.title: Complete History
historyPage.subtitle: View and manage all your transactions.
historyPage.noResults: No results for the applied filters.
historyPage.noTransactions: You don't have any recorded transactions yet.
historyPage.mobileHint: Tap a transaction to view details or actions.

settingsPage.title: Settings
settingsPage.subtitle: Adjust your system preferences.
settingsPage.preferencesDescription: Adjust the default currency of the system.

categoryChart.title: Expenses by Category
categoryChart.noDataDescription: Add expenses to see category analysis.
